mapper.sql: select r.record_id, r.teacher_id, r.salary_year, r.salary_month, r.post_salary, r.scale_salary, r.base_performance, r.reward_performance, r.talent_allowance, r.housing_allowance, r.other_allowance, r.social_insurance, r.housing_fund, r.income_tax, r.actual_salary, r.gross_salary, r.issue_status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.remark, t.teacher_no, t.teacher_name, d.dept_name from tea_salary_record r left join tea_teacher t on t.teacher_id = r.teacher_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = t.dept_id
mapper.select: where r.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by r.salary_year desc, r.salary_month desc

select COALESCE(SUM(gross_salary), 0) as totalGross, COALESCE(SUM(actual_salary), 0) as totalActual, COUNT(*) as totalCount, COUNT(DISTINCT teacher_id) as teacherCount from tea_salary_record
AND salary_year = #{salaryYear}
mapper.insert: insert into tea_salary_record( teacher_id, salary_year, salary_month, post_salary, scale_salary, base_performance, reward_performance, talent_allowance, housing_allowance, other_allowance, social_insurance, housing_fund, income_tax, actual_salary, gross_salary, issue_status, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{teacherId}, #{salaryYear}, #{salaryMonth}, #{postSalary}, #{scaleSalary}, #{basePerformance}, #{rewardPerformance}, #{talentAllowance}, #{housingAllowance}, #{otherAllowance}, #{socialInsurance}, #{housingFund}, #{incomeTax}, #{actualSalary}, #{grossSalary}, #{issueStatus}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from tea_salary_record where record_id in
#{recordId}
